name: JiimSmith ROI dashboard shows attribution and modeled revenue
description: Verify that the campaign Results tab renders the current analytics dashboard, including attribution, funnel charts, modeled revenue, post detail, and guarded integration actions.

planSteps.description: Open the ReelMatrix web app, go to Campaigns, open the active or first campaign, and switch to Results.
Verify the attribution note and controls render without a blank screen or stuck loading state.
If no posts have been published, verify the no-published-posts empty state explains that approved assets will land here after publishing.
If performance data exists, verify tiles render for Impressions, Clicks, Signups, Activated, Paid, and Modeled pipeline.
If performance data exists, verify the Where signups come from section renders a donut chart, a ranked bar chart, and a sentence naming the strongest channel.
If performance data exists, verify the Funnel by platform, Which platform converts best, Momentum, and Modeled revenue by platform sections render.
If the Value per signup slider is visible, move it to a clearly different value.
Verify the Modeled pipeline tile and modeled revenue chart update after the slider changes.
Verify Post-level detail can expand to show per-platform post tables when performance data exists.
Verify the Route wins to your stack card shows Linear and Webhook options whose send buttons remain disabled until a key or URL is entered.
